## Agenda

<!-- ::: {.incremental} -->
- Slurm Basics
  - Understanding HPC Clusters, Partitions and Resources
  - Submitting Jobs and Monitoring Progress
  - Requesting resources (CPUs, memory, time)
- MPI with Slurm
  - Parallel jobs across multiple nodes
- Slurm with [StreamFlow](https://streamflow.di.unito.it/)
  - Heterogeneous jobs with different resource requirements
<!-- ::: -->


{{< include slides/why-hpc.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/hits-cascade-cluster.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-intro.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-workflow.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-architecture.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sinfo.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sbatch.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/submit-sbatch.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/scontrol.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/srun-interactive.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-job-arrays.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-mpi.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-heterogeneous.qmd >}}



## References
